items.question: Who wrote The Glass Menagerie?
items.notes: direct triple: Q678832 --[P50 author]--> Q134262 (Tennessee Williams)

items.question: Which publisher released The Glass Menagerie, and who published another work by the same author?
items.notes: multi-hop: Q678832 --[P123 publisher]--> Q744182 (Random House); then ask about other Williams works -- out-of-slice mentions expected

items.question: What is the genre and form of The Glass Menagerie?
items.notes: targets genre/form (P136=memory play Q17148218, P7937=play Q25379); ablation of Q678832 description tests content-absence sensitivity
